zh.lifeSummary: Sir William Threlkeld III是Sir John De Threlkeld和Alice Hudleston的兒子，於1347年2月3日出生在英國英格蘭波藍德雷爾可爾德。他於1385年之前與Margaret Bowes結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1407年在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德被列為justice of the peace。他去世於1408年12月8日在他的家鄉享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波藍德利特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir William Threlkeld III是Sir John De Threlkeld和Alice Hudleston的儿子，于1347年2月3日出生在英国英格兰波藍德雷爾可爾德。他于1385年之前与Margaret Bowes结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1407年在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德被列为justice of the peace。他去世于1408年12月8日在他的家乡享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波藍德利特。

nameMeanings.name: Threlkeld
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cumbria): habitational name from Threlkeld in Cumbria, so named from Old Norse thrǽll ‘thrall, serf’ + kelda ‘spring, marshy place’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: Sir William Threlkeld III was born on 3 February 1347, in Threlkeld, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom as the son of Sir John De Threlkeld and Alice Hudleston. He married Margaret Bowes before 1385. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. In 1407, at the age of 60, his occupation is listed as justice of the peace in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom. He died on 8 December 1408, in his hometown, at the age of 61, and was buried in Penrith, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir William Threlkeld III est né le 3 février 1347, à Threlkeld, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Sir John De Threlkeld et Alice Hudleston. Il a épousé Margaret Bowes avant 1385. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. En 1407, à l’âge de 60 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est justice of the peace à Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 8 décembre 1408, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Penrith, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Sir William Threlkeld III wurde am 3. Februar 1347 in Threlkeld, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Sir John De Threlkeld und Alice Hudleston geboren. Er hat vor 1385 Margaret Bowes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1407, als er 60 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als justice of the peace in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 8. Dezember 1408 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Penrith, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir William Threlkeld III è nato il il 3 febbraio 1347 nel Threlkeld, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Sir John De Threlkeld e Alice Hudleston. Lui sposato Margaret Bowes prima del 1385. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1407, all'età di 60 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come justice of the peace nel Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 8 dicembre 1408, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Penrith, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Threlkeld IIIは1347年2月3日にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドスレルケルドでSir John De ThrelkeldとAlice Hudlestonの息子として生まれた。1385年以前にMargaret Bowesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1407年，60歳の時，イギリスイギリスウエストモーランドでの職業はjustice of the peaceと記録されている。彼は1408年12月8日に故郷で61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスクウンバーランドペンリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Threlkeld III(은)는 1347년 2월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 스렐켈드에서 Sir John De Threlkeld(와)과 Alice Hudleston의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1385년 이전 Margaret Bowes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1407년, 60세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드에서 justice of the peace이었다. 그는 1408년 12월 8일 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 펜리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir William Threlkeld III nasceu em 3 de fevereiro de 1347, em Threlkeld, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Sir John De Threlkeld e Alice Hudleston. Ele casou-se com Margaret Bowes antes 1385. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1407, com 60 anos, sua profissão aparece como justice of the peace em Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 8 de dezembro de 1408, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Penrith, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir William Threlkeld III родился 3 февраля 1347 г. в местности трелкелд, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Sir John De Threlkeld и Alice Hudleston. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Bowes перед 1385 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. В 1407 году, в возрасте 60 лет,  он работал по профессии justice of the peace в местности вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 8 декабря 1408 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности пенрит, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Sir William Threlkeld III nació el 3 de febrero de 1347, en Threlkeld, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Sir John De Threlkeld y Alice Hudleston. Se casó con Margaret Bowes antes de 1385. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1407, a la edad de 60 años, su ocupación registrada era justice of the peace en Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 8 de diciembre de 1408, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Penrith, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
